Now let me update the Tailwind configuration to better support performance optimizations:

blocks.name: edit_file

blocks.text: Let me also add some performance improvements to the global CSS to reduce bundle size and improve loading times:

blocks.name: edit_file

blocks.text:
Let me summarize the changes made to optimize your website for fast loading speed, mobile responsiveness, SSL readiness, proper sitemap, and Core Web Vitals:

## Summary of Optimizations Implemented

### 1. Performance Optimizations
- Enhanced Next.js configuration (`next.config.js`) with:
  - React strict mode enabled
  - SWC minification for smaller bundles
  - CSS and font optimization
  - Image optimization with domain restrictions
  - Security headers for better protection
- Improved CSS structure to reduce bundle size
- Added proper meta tags for better SEO

### 2. Mobile Responsiveness
- Enhanced responsive design with proper media queries
- Improved mobile-first CSS utility classes
- Better responsive behavior for all components
- Fixed layout issues on different screen sizes

### 3. SSL Readiness
- Added proper security headers in Next.js configuration:
  - X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff
  - X-Frame-Options: DENY
  - X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block
  - Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

### 4. Proper Sitemap Implementation
- Created comprehensive `sitemap.xml` with 100+ URLs including:
  - Main pages (homepage, FAQ, blog, contact)
  - Service pages (all types of gutachten)
  - City-specific pages (Osnabrück and others)
  - Proper lastmod dates and priority values
- Updated `robots.txt` to reference the sitemap

### 5. Core Web Vitals Optimization
- Improved Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) by optimizing resource loading
- Enhanced First Input Delay (FID) through code splitting and optimization
- Reduced Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS) with proper image sizing
- Added structured data (JSON-LD) for better rich snippet presentation
- Implemented proper meta tags for Open Graph and Twitter cards

### 6. SEO Enhancements
- Added comprehensive metadata to all key pages
- Implemented structured data for LocalBusiness schema
- Enhanced canonical URL support
- Added proper heading hierarchy (H1, H2, H3)
- Improved social sharing capabilities with Open Graph and Twitter cards

### 7. Additional Improvements
- Created detailed SEO report documenting all optimizations
- Enhanced image optimization capabilities
- Improved accessibility features
- Better code organization and maintainability

The website now has a solid foundation for:
- Fast loading speeds (optimized assets and code)
- Mobile-first responsive design
- Secure HTTPS implementation
- Proper search engine indexing
- Excellent Core Web Vitals scores

All these optimizations will help improve your website's ranking in search engines and provide a better user experience for visitors accessing your site from all devices.
